offer: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 invoices/month, failed subscription payments cause cash flow gaps. We monitor recurring payments instead of manual tracking of subscription payments.
problem: Failed subscription payments leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to Shopify store owners with demo video
Participate in community forums for Shopify tools
try_it: Let users try Email alerts and Dashboard for payment status
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
